name: Spike of the Hellhorned
desc_clean: Hellhorned X In an act of unity unheard of in Hellhorned culture, Grrrg the Railbeater snapped his own horn to seal the Rail in their Ring, bringing the Hellhorned into our Covenant.
mechanic_summary: Spike of the Hellhorned to Spell klanu Hellhorned. Hellhorned X In an act of unity unheard of in Hellhorned culture, Grrrg the Railbeater snapped his own horn to seal the Rail in their Ring, bringing the Hellhorned into our Covenant. Keywords: brak.
wiki_desc: Hellhorned X In an act of unity unheard of in Hellhorned culture, Grrrg the Railbeater snapped his own horn to seal the Rail in their Ring, bringing the Hellhorned into our Covenant. Grrrg the Railbeater was thereafter known as Grrrg Onehorn.
